title: Grilled Naan with Samphire and Spices
description: A flavorful Indian-inspired dish featuring grilled naan bread topped with sautéed samphire and aromatic spices.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Brush the naan bread with ghee or oil and season with salt.
Grill the naan bread for 2-3 minutes on each side, until lightly charred.
Meanwhile, heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the samphire to the pan and sauté for 3-4 minutes, until tender.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, and cayenne pepper.
To assemble the dish, place a grilled naan bread on a plate and top with a spoonful of the samphire mixture.
Serve immediately, with a lemon wedge on the side.
Repeat with the remaining naan bread and samphire mixture.
